p.em: Offloading blocking Linux syscalls to maintain Reactor responsiveness.

div.p: Regular files in Linux do not support epoll or non-blocking I/O in the same way sockets do. Even with O_NONBLOCK, a read() on a local filesystem can block the thread if data is not in the page cache.

ul.li: Waker (8B): Raw pointer to the coroutine's waker implementation.
Result Chan (8B): SPSC channel address for data return.

div.p: Runtime Safety: Worker threads use pread and pwrite to ensure thread-safe operations on shared FDs without requiring global file offset locks.
